name: Martian Successor Nadesico
overview: Only one ship stands between earth and total annihilation! The High Mobile Battleship Nadesico is the most formidable fighting machine ever conceived, but due to a shortage of trained soldiers, the crew is a little unorthodox. The poor Jovians don't stand a chance against the largest contingent of geeks and misfits ever sent into orbit!

trailers.title: Opening | YOU GET TO BURNING - Yumi Matsuzawa [Subtitled]
